'''Bassadro''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] with glassy crags on its dormant volcanoes. It was devastated in a [[Battle of Bassadro|battle]] in which it was taken from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] by [[Empatojayos Brand]].

{{Planet-stub}}
